LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING.PLAINTIFF KELLEY MAZZEI'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED CLASS ACTION COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAY 30, 2013. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF KELLEY MAZZEI, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF OTHER MEMBERS OF THE GENERAL PUBLIC SIMILARLY SITUATED'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE FIRST AMENDED CLASS ACTION COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. THE COURT WILL NOT RULE ON THE SUFFICIENCY OF PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED PLEADINGS; THE PREFERRED METHOD IS TO PERMIT THE AMENDMENT AND ALLOW DEFENDANTS TO TEST THE SUFFICIENCY OF THE PLEADINGS BY GENERAL DEMURRER, JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, ETC. SEE CALIFORNIA CAS. GEN. INS. CO. V. SUPERIOR COURT, 173 CAL. APP. 3D 274, 218 (1985) DISAPPROVED OF ON OTHER GROUNDS BY KRANSCO V. AM. EMPIRE SURPLUS LINES INS. CO., 23 CAL. 4TH 390 (2000). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-01-2013 Set For Case Management Conference On Jul-17-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-02-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File First Amended Class Action Complaint
Off Calendar May-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF KELLEY MAZZEI, INDIVIDUALLY, AND ON BEHALF OF OTHER MEMBERS OF THE GENERAL PUBLIC SIMILARLY SITUATED's Motion For Leave To File First Amended Class Action Complaint is granted. The Court will not rule on the sufficiency of Plaintiff's proposed pleadings; the preferred method is to permit the amendment and allow Defendants to test the sufficiency of the pleadings by general demurrer, judgment on the pleadings, etc. See California Cas. Gen. Ins. Co. v. Superior Court, 173 Cal. App. 3d 274, 218 (1985) disapproved of on other grounds by Kransco v. Am. Empire Surplus Lines Ins. Co., 23 Cal. 4th 390 (2000). Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
